Business: Le Merite Exports Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacturing, purchase, and sale of textile in India and internationally. It offers cotton, cotton blended, and synthetic yarns; greige and finished fabrics; and weaving job units, such as machinery details. The company was incorporated in 2003 and is headquartered in Mumbai…

  Current: 120.50  (-0.21% vs prior)

  Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 16.73  (+6.76% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
